coreCompetencies: Basic notions of data governance policies and standards
Documents data assets and their owners in a catalog
Applies a simple data classification (public, internal, confidential)
Captures lineage documentation for known pipelines
Notions of personal data and GDPR principles
Records metadata and business glossary terms
Understands the role of a data steward
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with a data catalog tool (Collibra, Alation)
Awareness of data privacy and consent
indicators: Documents basic assets and glossary terms
Needs 6-12 months of mentoring in governance

coreCompetencies: Applies data classification and sensitivity labels consistently
Maintains the business glossary and metadata in the catalog
Supports data stewards in enforcing policies for a domain
Documents lineage and ownership for critical data elements
Tracks data quality issues against agreed rules
Handles personal and special-category data per GDPR
Prepares governance reports and policy compliance checks
complementaryCompetencies: Hands-on with a catalog tool (Collibra, Alation, DataHub)
Notions of access control and role-based permissions
Familiarity with regulatory requirements (GDPR, sector rules)
indicators: Keeps catalog and glossary up to date

coreCompetencies: Designs governance policies and stewardship workflows for a domain
Defines classification schemes and sensitivity tiers
Runs data quality rules with SLAs on critical datasets
Coordinates data stewards and resolves ownership gaps
Manages the catalog, glossary and lineage as a governed asset
Implements GDPR controls: retention, minimization, subject rights
Reports governance and adoption metrics to stakeholders
complementaryCompetencies: Notions of federated governance in a data mesh
indicators: Leads governance initiatives for a domain

coreCompetencies: Architects the governance program across multiple domains
Defines the enterprise policy framework and stewardship model
Establishes classification, sensitivity and access standards
Sets data quality SLAs and monitors them as service commitments
Runs governance committees and decision forums
Leads GDPR and multi-regulation compliance for data
Tracks adoption metrics and drives catalog usage
complementaryCompetencies: Data ethics and responsible data use
indicators: Defines governance strategy for the organization
Is a governance reference for the company

coreCompetencies: Leads governance across domains with a federated operating model
Defines governance standards, roles and accountability
Sets classification, retention and access policy at platform scale
Governs data quality as SLAs with clear ownership
Runs the governance council and manages data risk
Aligns GDPR, sovereignty and sector regulation into one framework
Measures adoption, stewardship coverage and policy compliance
complementaryCompetencies: Federated governance in a data mesh

coreCompetencies: Directs the governance strategy for a business unit
Manages governance programs and stewardship at scale
Defines governance architecture: catalog, lineage, policy engine
Leads global compliance across regions and regulations
Establishes data quality SLAs and risk management practices
Governs data ethics and responsible use policies
Reports governance KPIs and adoption to leadership
indicators: Contributes to the enterprise data strategy

coreCompetencies: Sets the multi-year governance strategy for the company
Establishes the federated governance operating model and councils
Standardizes classification, retention and access policy enterprise-wide
Governs data quality SLAs, lineage and stewardship at enterprise scale
Aligns GDPR, sovereignty and sector regulation into a single program
Defines governance KPIs, adoption targets and risk appetite
Advises executives on data risk, privacy and compliance
complementaryCompetencies: Influence on governance standards and reference models
indicators: Reports to the CDO on governance and risk

coreCompetencies: Owns the enterprise governance vision across all domains
Aligns governance with business strategy and risk management
Defines reference governance models adopted company-wide
Leads governance for mergers, acquisitions and integrations
Establishes stewardship, quality-SLA and classification standards at scale
Sets privacy, ethics and responsible-data frameworks
Sponsors governance councils and stewardship communities
complementaryCompetencies: Shapes external regulatory and standards relationships
Advises the board on data risk and privacy
indicators: Sits on the data leadership committee

coreCompetencies: Sets and executes the enterprise data governance vision
Aligns governance with corporate strategy and regulatory posture
Owns privacy, ethics and compliance frameworks across the company
Builds and leads the governance organization
Defines the federated governance operating model and councils
Establishes data quality SLAs and stewardship accountability globally
Governs data risk, sovereignty and responsible use at scale
